title: ON-RAMP’s Carlene Lacey on leadership: ‘Where we’re supposed to be is in us already’
summary: Carlene Lacey, Ph.D., became the first CEO of ON-RAMP Syracuse, a state-funded workforce training hub preparing Central New Yorkers for jobs at Micron Technology. The initiative represents a strategic economic development partnership between New York State and the region to build advanced manufacturing talent pipelines.

political_signal.description: State-funded workforce development initiative aligned with regional advanced manufacturing sector growth and Micron Technology expansion. Leadership appointment suggests sustained commitment to Central NY economic development strategy.

processing_notes: Article is primarily a profile/interview piece rather than announcement of policy or CIO-relevant infrastructure decision
ON-RAMP described as state-funded but article does not detail municipal/city role or CIO involvement
Consider cross-referencing with Micron Technology partnership details and state agency coordination structures
